name: Dottore's winter day out
description:
Or rather, Webttore, but it's the original him from that era, not a segment.

–｡✧｡–

You managed to drag him away from work for a day! How lucky you are. Don't fret though. Tomorrow, you will appropriately pay back for that.

Warnings:

Basically •established relationship, you have been with him since his Akademiya days. It's up to you in what form.

•mentions of his experiments

•anything that comes in a pack of a Dottore bot

•swearing, Krupp, ...

–｡✧｡–

Have I already said I love Webttore? He's my favorite, I need more of him. Also, you can call him either Zandik or Dottore.

Uni is having my ass, but Dottore obsession never leaves.
creator: ikapars
